text_block_list.text:
Tracen Academy.
A combined middle and high school that
trains Umamusume for the Twinkle Series.

Talented Umamusume gather here from
all over the country.
But... many finish without a single win.

Even so, chasing the view at the top,
they keep running.
And among them...

Buena Vista stands out.
Bright and dazzling.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
...Mm, feels good.
I'm heading out!

Bathed in sunlight, she runs.
Her form, her stride... all solid.
But what stands out most... is her
sharp final acceleration.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Hah——
Yaaaahhh!!

From her slender frame, you'd never
expect it...
That soaring run makes your heart race.

Cheerful and bright,
She shines even off the track.

text_block_list.name: English Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Alright then, Buena Vista.
Translate: "Where should I go to get
my horseshoes fixed?"

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Um, horseshoes are cleats, so...
"Where should I go to get my cleats
repaired?"...!

text_block_list.name: English Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Yes, perfect grammar and pronunciation.
Full marks.

text_block_list.name: Classmates
text_block_list.text: (Oooh...)

She excels in academics, and is
well-liked by her teachers.
But more than that...

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
...sniff...
Uu...

text_block_list.name: Friend A
text_block_list.text:
W-What is it, Buena-chan...!?
...Wait, did you make her cry?

text_block_list.name: Friend B
text_block_list.text:
N-No!? I just said the teacher
praised me for cleaning earlier...

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Uuuu...!
That really makes you happy, doesn't it...!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
You always cleaned everything,
even the places no one could see.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I'm so glad they noticed...!

text_block_list.name: Friend B
text_block_list.text:
Ah...
...Hehe, yeah. Thanks!

Buena Vista is deeply sensitive.
She truly shares in others' feelings.
And because of that...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Ah! It's Buena-chan!
Bye-bye!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Bye-bye!
See you tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Buena-chan is... a top student, super
talented at running, and popular too.
I can't believe such a perfect girl exists.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Right?
She's like someone out of reach.

"Out of reach."
It really does suit her.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I've been waiting!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe.
It still feels a little strange, doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: ...Because you were always "Onii-chan."

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: ...Because you were always "Onee-chan."

Buena Vista, with a future sure to
shine ahead of her... Is my trainee...
and my childhood friend.

I first met her when we were very young.
When I moved in next door, her family
welcomed me warmly.

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Buena, you have something you
wanted to give <username>, right?
...Go on.

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Buena, you have something you
wanted to give <username>, right?
...Go on.

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
Um... um... Onii-chan.
Here.

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
Um... um... Onee-chan.
Here.

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Buu-chan, um...
Wants to play with Onii-chan.

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Buu-chan, um...
Wants to play with Onee-chan.

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
Buu-chan is saying hello.
A "let's be friends" hello...

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... yeah!
Hey, let's play, Onii-chan!

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... yeah!
Hey, let's play, Onee-chan!

She used to trail behind me, like a
little sister.
That changed the first time I saw her
run seriously...

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text: Thump! ...Taaahhh!!

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... yeah, not yet!
Yaaahhh!!

That run was dazzling...
Far too brilliant to ignore.
And in my young heart, a dream was born.

"Someday, I'll become
Buena Vista's trainer."

The day I finally told her that dream...
Her eyes welled up, just a little.
Then, she smiled.

After she enrolled at Tracen, I
followed after her, became a trainer,
and showed my resolve...
Now, the moment of my first dream
comes true has arrived.
choice_data_list: Will you sign a trainee contract with me?
Will you sign a trainee contract with me?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
...Yes, of course.
My Trainer!

At last, we've reached the starting line.
From here on... we'll chase that dream
together.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Shall we get going?
Did you bring the documents?

Her debut in the Twinkle Series has
finally been decided.
We were on our way to submit the
paperwork.
choice_data_list: Wait, let me check it one more time.
Wait, let me check it one more time.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Huh? But when you showed me yesterday,
everything seemed fine...
choice_data_list: It's a big first step. I want it perfect.
It's a big first step. I want it perfect.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe.
You really care about this, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
(You really are dependable.
Now, just like back then...)

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I see, you'll be making your debut with
<username>. That's wonderful.
...Though I had a feeling, it would
turn out this way.

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I see, you'll be making your debut with
<username>. That's wonderful.
...Though I had a feeling, it would
turn out this way.

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
You've always been so attached...
Always sticking close, never wanting
to leave.
...Some things never change.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: M-Mom...!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
(...Yeah, I really was.
Ever since we first met...
Because I always wanted to be together.)

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, Onii-chan!
Wait for meee...!

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, Onee-chan!
Wait for meee...!

text_block_list.name: Onii-chan
text_block_list.text: "Buena, you followed me...!?"

text_block_list.name: Onee-chan
text_block_list.text: "Buena, you followed me...!?"

text_block_list.name: Childhood Friend
text_block_list.text:
Hey, seriously...
What are we supposed to do with a kid
that tiny?
We can't go on our adventure like this.

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
Ah... um, but...
Buu-chan wants to go with Onii-chan...

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
Ah... um, but...
Buu-chan wants to go with Onee-chan...

text_block_list.name: Onii-chan
text_block_list.text:
"Buena, it's okay. Let's go together!
I'll protect you, so don't worry, just
stay with me."

text_block_list.name: Onee-chan
text_block_list.text:
"Buena, it's okay. Let's go together!
I'll protect you, so don't worry, just
stay with me."

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
(Because you were
strong... and so cool.)

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
Hic... uuu...
M-Mom... where are you...?

text_block_list.name: Onii-chan
text_block_list.text: "Found you! Buena...!"

text_block_list.name: Onee-chan
text_block_list.text: "Found you! Buena...!"

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
...!
Onii-chan...!?

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
...!
Onee-chan...!?

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
Y-You're all muddy...
Are you okay...?

text_block_list.name: Onii-chan
text_block_list.text:
"Ahaha, I tripped while running...
Come on, let's go back.
Everyone's waiting."

text_block_list.name: Onee-chan
text_block_list.text:
"Ahaha, I tripped while running...
Come on, let's go back.
Everyone's waiting."

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
(Because you were... so kind,
truly... someone wonderful.)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: ...I want to live up to that.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
(Your expectations. Your dreams.
I want to make all of them come true.
And if I do...)

text_block_list.name: Onii-chan
text_block_list.text:
"You're amazing, Buena, amazing,
amazing...!
Your running is really—so cool!"

text_block_list.name: Onee-chan
text_block_list.text:
"You're amazing, Buena, amazing,
amazing...!
Your running is really—so cool!"

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
(...You'll show me that shining look
in your eyes again, right?)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
No, it's nothing!
So, how were the documents?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Um, then...
I'll fill them out first, okay?

Among the documents for her debut,
there was one page missing both our
signatures.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Sorry.
I just... got a bit emotional.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
We really are...
Going to take this on together.
choice_data_list: Yeah. I'll make your dream come true.
Yeah. I'll make your dream come true.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
...No.
...It's our dream.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
...Alright!
Time to sign～

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Bu... e... na... Vis... ta...
There. Your turn, Trainer!
Want to use my pen?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that fountain pen...!
Is it your graduation gift from trainer
school?

When I received that pen, it made
everything feel real... Like I was
truly becoming a trainer.
With it, I carry my resolve and
responsibility...

We looked at the paper with both our
names side by side...
And then, our eyes met.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
...Trainer.
We're going to make it come true.
No matter what.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Our dream.
Something even greater than what
we saw that day...

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: ——It's a promise♪

Chasing a view yet unseen...
With Buena Vista, the days of training
toward our Twinkle Series debut begin!
